nav.title: We support hospitality and tourism businesses
nav.title2: with strategic thinking, operational structure and stronger business control
nav.title3: We design practical solutions that improve day-to-day operations, strengthen control and support better decision-making.
nav.title4: Experience, discipline and practical thinking become an advantage for your business

home.heroSubtitle: Strategy, design and execution for HORECA brands.

about.title: About us
about.headline: HORECA PLUS operates as a strategic partner for hospitality and tourism businesses.
about.intro: We support businesses that seek better organization, stronger control, clearer operational visibility and a more stable foundation for growth.
about.paragraph1: We combine operational experience, industry knowledge and analytical thinking in order to turn complex business and operational needs into solutions that can be applied in practice.
about.paragraph2: Our support covers critical areas such as costing, pricing policy, operational organization, procurement management, process design, team training and decision-making support.
about.paragraph3: We approach every collaboration with professionalism, discretion and a strong focus on results, aiming to deliver real value to businesses that want a serious partner with practical thinking and measurable contribution.

pillars.title: Operational clarity
pillars.text: We provide a clear view of operations, workflows, data and the real priorities of the business.

pillars.title: Strategy with execution
pillars.text: We design solutions that do not remain theoretical, but can be implemented in a practical and organized way.

pillars.title: Integrated approach
pillars.text: We connect financial data, operations, people, suppliers and procedures within one coherent decision-making framework.

pillars.title: Consistency and reliability
pillars.text: We work with seriousness, accountability and constant commitment to the quality of both the collaboration and the outcome.

services.heroTitle: Services with strategic value and practical execution
services.heroSubtitle: We provide services that cover critical areas of a hospitality or tourism business, from financial visibility and costing to process organization, procurement, team training and commercial policy.
services.introText: Our goal is to strengthen operational stability, business control and the company’s ability to grow on a more organized and sustainable foundation.

categories.title: Financial Planning & Strategy
categories.description: Financial models, costing, pricing and reports that drive focused decisions.

items.title: Financial Planning
items.short: We build a data-driven financial model to forecast profitability and support accurate decisions.

items.title: Product & Service Costing
items.short: Unit cost and margin analysis for full control of your pricing strategy.

items.title: Pricing Strategy & Price Setting
items.short: Pricing strategies based on cost, market and goals for a consistent and profitable positioning.

items.title: Financial Analysis & Reporting
items.short: KPIs and reports with clear interpretations that support targeted strategic decisions.

categories.title: Operations & Optimization
categories.description: Suppliers, inventory, equipment, menu, training and SOPs for efficient day-to-day operation.

items.title: Supplier Evaluation & Selection
items.short: We build a reliable supplier network for better pricing without compromising quality.

items.title: Supplier & Inventory Monitoring
items.short: We track purchasing costs and price fluctuations, produce reports and suggest corrective actions.

items.title: Equipment Study & Selection
items.short: Fit-for-purpose equipment proposals for maximum space and staff efficiency at controlled cost.

items.title: Sales Menu Design
items.short: Menu engineering with sales psychology to lift average check and enhance guest experience.

items.title: Service & Wine Training
items.short: Training in service and wine-pairing for a professional image and increased sales.

items.title: SOPs & Compliance Control
items.short: We create procedures, train your team and monitor adherence for consistency and fewer errors.

categories.title: Support Services
categories.description: Trusted partners for accounting, HR, safety, licensing and HACCP.

items.title: Comprehensive Accounting Support
items.short: A dedicated partner who supports and advises across your accounting framework.

items.title: HR & Payroll
items.short: Specialized partner for contracts, ERGANI declarations, payroll and recruitment.

items.title: Safety Technician
items.short: Ensures compliance with safety measures for staff, guests and facilities.

items.title: Licensed Engineer
items.short: Handles licensing procedures and manages operational issues as they arise.

items.title: HACCP
items.short: Prerequisite programs, staff training and record-keeping compliance.
